subject: {player} attracting attention from {rival}
body:
{player}'s performances have attracted attention from {rival}. They've been asking around about the player and seem genuinely interested.

We may need to make a decision on {player}'s future soon.

es.subject: {player} atrae la atención de {rival}
es.body:
Las actuaciones de {player} han atraído la atención de {rival}. Han estado preguntando y parecen genuinamente interesados.

Puede que tengamos que tomar una decisión sobre el futuro de {player} pronto.
